ignoreCommand: bash -c 'if [[ "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" == claude/* || "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" == codex/* ]]; then echo "Skipping build for $VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF"; exit 0; else exit 1; fi'

headers.value: frame-ancestors 'self' https://bmj21.com https://www.bmj21.com https://beismedrashdjackson21.com https://www.beismedrashdjackson21.com https://shul-website.vercel.app https://*.vercel.app
